response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and strong leadership in technical domains like developer tooling and testing infrastructure, but lacks direct experience in mobile platforms and organizational change leadership. His hands-on coding and system design skills are strong, but his people management experience is indirect (mostly technical leadership rather than formal team management) and his industry experience leans toward web/mobile apps rather than developer tools or build systems.
strengths: Extensive experience in developer tooling and testing infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, AI-agent infrastructure, CI/CD setup)
Strong technical leadership with hands-on coding in multiple languages (TypeScript, DLang, Java, etc.)
Proven track record in optimizing systems and contributing to open-source projects
concerns: Limited direct experience with mobile-platform ecosystems or build systems
People management experience is primarily technical leadership rather than formal team management
Industry experience is more aligned with web/mobile apps than developer tools or build systems
